name: WeekPicker
description: Week selection picker with ISO week numbering

min.description: ISO week string for minimum date

max.description: ISO week string for maximum date

ariaAttributes.aria-label: Descriptive label for week list and items
ariaAttributes.aria-label-nav: Previous year / Next year for navigation buttons

initialization.description: Initializes all week picker components. Calculates weeks for current year, renders week list dynamically, sets up year navigation, week selection, and keyboard navigation.

currentYear.managedBy: data-year attribute on picker element and internal variable

weeksList.description: List of week objects for current year, calculated and rendered dynamically
weeksList.format: Array of { week: number, startDate: Date, endDate: Date }

actions: Call renderWeeks() to regenerate week list for new year
Call renderWeeks() to regenerate week list for new year

eventHandlers.description: Selects a week when clicking on week button
actions: Get week number and weekStr from button's data-week and data-week-value attributes
Set tabindex='-1' and aria-selected='false' on all weeks
Set tabindex='0' and aria-selected='true' on selected button
Dispatch 'week-select' custom event with weekStr in detail
eventHandlers.note: Week buttons are created dynamically in renderWeeks(), each gets click handler

actions: Get array of all enabled weeks (excluding disabled)
Get current week index in enabled weeks array
Calculate new index based on key:
If new index calculated: Focus new week button, update tabindex (0 on new, -1 on old)
eventHandlers.note: Keyboard navigation only moves between enabled weeks (skips disabled)

ArrowUp.action: Moves focus to previous enabled week
ArrowUp.note: Does not wrap - stops at first week

ArrowDown.action: Moves focus to next enabled week
ArrowDown.note: Does not wrap - stops at last week

Home.action: Moves focus to first enabled week

End.action: Moves focus to last enabled week

Tab.note: Only selected week has tabindex='0', others have '-1'

data-week-picker.purpose: Identifies week picker element for initialization
data-week-picker.usedBy: initWeekPickers function to find all week picker instances

data-selected-week.usedBy: Initial selection state and week-select event

data-disabled.purpose: Indicates if entire picker is disabled

data-locale.usedBy: Date range formatting in week display

data-week.purpose: Stores week number for each week button
data-week.usedBy: Week selection handler to identify which week was clicked

data-week-value.purpose: Stores formatted week string (YYYY-Www) for each week button
data-week-value.usedBy: Week selection handler and keyboard navigation for event dispatch

customEvents.name: week-select
customEvents.description: Dispatched when a week is selected
customEvents.listenedBy: DateInput component to update input value
customEvents.format: YYYY-Www where ww is week number padded to 2 digits

internal: getWeeksForYear function (calculates ISO weeks for year)

weekCalculation.method: getWeeksForYear() calculates ISO 8601 weeks for given year
weekCalculation.algorithm: Finds first week of year (first week with Thursday), calculates all weeks
weekCalculation.format: Array of { week: number, startDate: Date, endDate: Date }
weekCalculation.description: Weeks are calculated based on ISO 8601 standard (week starts Monday)

weekRendering.method: Dynamic DOM creation - clears list and creates new week buttons
elements: Week button with classes, data attributes, disabled state
weekRendering.description: Week list is completely regenerated on year change

weekSelection.tabindexUpdate: Sets tabindex='0' on selected, '-1' on others
weekSelection.ariaUpdate: Sets aria-selected='true' on selected, 'false' on others

disabledWeekCalculation.method: Calculated in renderWeeks() for each week
conditions: OR (minYear/minWeek defined AND (currentYear < minYear OR (currentYear === minYear AND week < minWeek)))
OR (maxYear/maxWeek defined AND (currentYear > maxYear OR (currentYear === maxYear AND week > maxWeek)))
disabledWeekCalculation.description: Disabled states calculated during week rendering

keyboardNavigation.enabledWeeksOnly: Only navigates between enabled weeks (excludes disabled)
keyboardNavigation.focusManagement: Only focused week has tabindex='0', others have '-1'
keyboardNavigation.description: Keyboard navigation skips disabled weeks automatically

dateFormatting.description: Date range shown in each week button

withDateInput.detail: Contains week value in YYYY-Www format
withDateInput.listener: DateInput component listens and updates input value
withDateInput.description: WeekPicker is typically used within DateInput component

implementationNotes: Initialization runs immediately on script load AND on astro:page-load for SPA navigation
Double initialization prevented by checking data-init attribute before setting up handlers
Week list is completely regenerated (innerHTML cleared) on every year change
Week buttons are created dynamically with addEventListener attached to each
Week calculation uses ISO 8601 standard (week starts Monday, first week contains January 4th)
Weeks can span year boundaries - weeks are included if they overlap with current year
Selected week is tracked both in data-selected-week attribute and via CSS class on button
Tabindex management ensures only selected week is focusable via keyboard (tabindex='0'), others are '-1'
Keyboard navigation only moves between enabled weeks - disabled weeks are automatically skipped
ArrowUp/Down do not wrap - stops at first/last enabled week
Home/End keys move to first/last enabled week (not first/last in DOM)
Week range display shows formatted start and end dates using locale
Week number and range are displayed in separate spans within each button
Disabled weeks cannot be selected via click or keyboard
ARIA attributes (aria-selected, aria-label) are dynamically set on week buttons
Week value format in event is YYYY-Www (ISO 8601 week format)
Min/max constraints are parsed from YYYY-Www format and stored as separate year/week values
Week calculation is complex - uses ISO 8601 algorithm to find week boundaries
All week buttons get click handlers attached during renderWeeks()
Selected week gets focus automatically after selection
List aria-label is updated when year changes for accessibility

_iconPathMetadata.description: Icon paths document where hardcoded/default icons come from (heroicons or custom SVG)
